name: @rattle/ai-workspace
description: AI-native workspace for the Rattle product configurator (rattleapp.de). Installs 8 Anthropic-format Skills (configurator, api, pricelist-analysis, suggest-config, document-templates, apply-config, audit, tenant-memory), 3 Claude Code subagents, 4 slash commands, JSON Schemas for every output contract, golden I/O examples, and a cross-platform AGENTS.md so any AI model (Claude, GPT, Cursor, Codex, Aider, Continue) can produce correct, BOM-aware Rattle configurations.
